title: The Governors (Emoluments, Allowances and Privileges) Act, 1982
full_text: The Governors (Emoluments, Allowances and Privileges) Act, 1982 राज्यपाल (उपलब्धिऔयां, भत्ते और विशेषाधिकार) अधिनियम, 1982 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198243 Act Number: 43 Enactment Date: 1982-08-28 Act Year: 1982 Short Title: The Governors (Emoluments, Allowances and Privileges) Act, 1982 Hindi Title: राज्यपाल (उपलब्धिऔयां, भत्ते और विशेषाधिकार) अधिनियम, 1982 Long Title: An Act to determine the emoluments, allowances and privileges of Governors. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Home Enforcement Date: 01-04-1987 Notification: 1st April 1987, vide notification No. G.S.R. 342(E), dated 30th March, 1987, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
